explanations.6: This maps port 80 on your computer to port 80 inside the container, so web traffic coming to your machine gets forwarded to Apache.
explanations.8: This does the same thing as line 6, but for HTTPS traffic on port 443, so secure connections also work.
explanations.10: This shares your local ./src folder with the container's /usr/local/apache2/htdocs folder, so any files you edit locally appear immediately inside Apache without rebuilding.
